Title: Valid User Login
Test Steps:
1. User enters email and password on the login screen.
2. The UI sends the credentials to Firebase Authentication.
3. Firebase Authentication validates the credentials and returns a token and user data.
4. The UI receives the token and user data.
Expected Result: The user is successfully logged in and redirected to the main dashboard.

Title: Invalid User Login
Test Steps:
1. User enters email and password on the login screen.
2. The UI sends the credentials to Firebase Authentication.
3. Firebase Authentication returns an error message.
4. The UI displays the error message to the user.

Title: User Registration
Test Data:
- Email: newuser@example.com
- Password: password123
- Name: John Doe
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. The UI requests the user's registration data.
3. The user enters their email, password, and name.
4. The UI sends the registration data to Firebase Authentication.
5. Firebase Authentication validates the data and saves the user.
6. The UI receives confirmation of successful registration.

Title: Invalid User Registration
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. The UI requests the user's registration data.
3. The user enters invalid data.
4. The UI sends the registration data to Firebase Authentication.
5. Firebase Authentication returns an error message.
6. The UI displays the error message to the user.

Title: Create Report with Valid Data
Test Data:
- Description: Report about a broken street light
- Image: sample_image.jpg
- Coordinates: 40.712776, -74.005974
- Urgency: High
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the report creation page.
2. The UI requests the report data.
3. The user enters the report details and selects an image.
4. The UI sends the report data to Firebase Firestore.
5. Firebase Firestore saves the report and assigns it to the nearest competent entity.
6. The UI receives confirmation of successful report saving.

Title: Create Report with Invalid Data
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the report creation page.
2. The UI requests the report data.
3. The user enters invalid data.
4. The UI sends the report data to Firebase Firestore.
5. Firebase Firestore returns an error message.
6. The UI displays the error message to the user.

Title: View User Reports
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the user reports page.
2. The UI displays the user's reports.
Expected Result: The user can view their reports on the reports page.

Title: View Report Details
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a report
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the report details page for a specific report.
2. The UI displays the report details.
Expected Result: The user can view the details of a specific report on the report details page.

Title: User Receives Notification
Test Steps:
1. A new notification is created for a user's report.
2. The UI displays the notification to the user.
Expected Result: The user receives a notification for their report.

Title: User Marks Notification as Read
Test Steps:
1. The user marks a notification as read.
2. The UI updates the notification status.
Expected Result: The user's notification is marked as read.

Title: User Assigns Report to Area
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a report
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the report details page for a specific report.
2. The user assigns the report to a specific area.
3. The UI sends the report data to Firebase Firestore.
4. Firebase Firestore updates the report's area.
Expected Result: The report is assigned to the specified area.

Title: User Assigns Report to Category
Preconditions: User is logged in and has a report
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the report details page for a specific report.
2. The user assigns the report to a specific category.
3. The UI sends the report data to Firebase Firestore.
4. Firebase Firestore updates the report's category.
Expected Result: The report is assigned to the specified category.
